title: *Dev Mode* Engage – No Trivial Proofs, No Hello, No Mass-Pass
steps: Reject proofs whose content matches /(hello|sample|placeholder|noop)/i
Require min artifact criteria: file|pr|endpoint|dataset with checks
Require at least one: non-zero diff|new endpoint responding|dataset rows>0|screenshot non-blank

title: Decision→Dispatch Router (Council→Agents)
steps: Map council decisions to dispatch topics: {'proceed':'implement','fix':'debug','pause':'quiesce','research':'analyze','optimize':'perf','validate':'qa'}
Add /api/ops/decisions/route that enqueues concrete tasks per topic
Emit routing proof artifact per decision

title: ProofGate v2 (Truthful)
steps: Implement checks: exists, nonempty, schema, sha256, size>0, diff_lines>=1 OR endpoint_200 OR image_nonblank
Record verdict per check; fail if any required check fails
Store artifacts to connectome.proof_artifacts with creator + job_id

title: Testing Chamber – Safe Edit Pipeline
steps: Expose routes: POST /api/testchamber/plan, POST /sandbox, POST /diff, POST /lint, POST /proof, POST /pr
Contract: {file, selectors?, intent, edits[], validators[], rollback:true}
Sandbox overlay filesystem; never writes live until PR proof passes

title: Edit Existing First (No Spam Create)
steps: Before create: search fuzzy path+AST signature; if >0.75 similarity, patch instead
Block new files without Rosetta header (OWNERS/TAGS/STABILITY/INTEGRATIONS)
Auto-enqueue Unifier task when near-duplicate exists

title: ChatDev Orchestration ↔ Ops Queue Unification
steps: Standardize job envelope: {intent, context, inputs, expected_proof, budget}
Register pipelines: implement|debug|perf|qa|docs mapped to agents
Ensure outputs emit proofs, not logs

title: Admin Token Autoload + Guard
steps: Load ADMIN_TOKEN from secrets; guard mutate routes
Add /api/ops/healthz showing guarded routes and auth mode

title: Port Conflict Guard
steps: If port busy: backoff+retry, or bind to next available; write /run/port.json
Surface in /readyz with bound port

title: No-Lies Game Smokes
steps: /api/game/boot-smoke → resources>0 & save-slot writable
Canvas render-probe → non-blank pixel
New Game flow → safeBoot awaited & HUD mounts

title: Decision Audit Log
steps: Append every council decision + dispatch outcome to ops/decisions.log.ndjson
Expose /api/ops/decisions/today

title: Coverage Cadence ↔ Router
steps: On cadence tick, emit decision with sector+pattern
Router expands to concrete work items with existing-file preference

title: Temple of Knowledge Index (Obsidian)
steps: Build docs/_index.json from vault (House of Leaves/Oldest House/Temple)
Backlink unresolved cross-refs; open PR to fix broken anchors

title: Navigator Context (RAG)
steps: Index Rosetta headers + key docs into local embeddings
/api/context/resolve returns top-k context for an edit job

title: Gameplay Loop – Minimal Playability Pass
steps: Ensure base content packs seeded (resources/generators/upgrades)
HUD: show incomes, costs, tooltips, buy works; autosave tick

title: Testing Chamber Contract – Example Edit
steps: Request edit of existing HUD file via selectors (no new file)
Dry-run diff must be >0 lines; lint passes; proof attaches patch

title: Proof Severity Table
steps: Block merge if required checks fail; allow warn-only for optional checks
Refuse verdict if artifact is only logs with no measurable effect

title: Decision→Topic Map (Materialized)
steps: proceed→implement, fix→debug, research→analyze, optimize→perf, validate→qa, docs→docs
Publish to ops/router/topics.json

title: Stop Token Waste – Offline Narrative Cycling
steps: Allow offline agents narrative cycling with soft caps
Disallow paid LLM by default; local-first Ollama routing

title: Testing Chamber – LLM-Assisted Patch
steps: LLM proposes patch → Testing Chamber executes plan/diff/lint/proof/PR
Disallow direct writes outside Chamber

title: Router Backpressure & Retries
steps: Exponential backoff; max attempts; dead-letter queue with proofs

title: E2E: Decision→PR
steps: Emit council—fix→ debug topic → agent opens PR with diff
Proof: PR contains changed lines>0; linked issue resolved

title: UI Dev HUD v1
steps: Panel shows last smokes, proofs_today, decisions routed, queue len
Toggle 'silence while working' (reduced logs)

title: Game Autosave/Restore Hardened
steps: Dirty-check, safe write, recovery on failure; report via boot-smoke

title: Achievement Chassis (20 basics)
steps: Server verifies triggers; UI badge list; proof via unlocked count>0

title: Economy Curves (playable)
steps: Costs/logistic; output multipliers; prestige α breakpoints

title: House of Leaves – Routing & Proof Handbook
steps: Write handbook for council→router→agent→proof
Include Testing Chamber contract & examples

title: Conflict Resolver (No Mass-Pass)
steps: When conflicts arise, open focused fix PRs with per-hunk proofs
Prohibit blanket test 'pass' flips; require reason+trace

title: HUD Responsiveness (Mobile/Desktop)
steps: Aspect-ratio container; DPR scaling; input abstraction

title: Navigator Hints (Editor Rosetta)
steps: When editing file, suggest required integrations & related modules
Emit checklist proof artifact on each edit

title: Testing Chamber E2E – Existing File Only
steps: Attempt to create new file when similar exists → expect block
Edit pre-existing file via selectors; expect diff>0 and lint OK

title: Decision Silence Mode (Token Save)
steps: Add /api/ops/logging?level=quiet working mode
Default to minimal chat output during long runs
